title: Zombified mobs
description: adds zombified variants for non hostile mobs
body:
Zombified mobs currently adds three zombified variants for the cow, pig, and chicken. I do plan on adding more in the future, I mainly made this mod for my upcoming modpack but decided to release it standalone as well due to nocubes not being updated to 1.20.  Currently all of theses mobs only spawn at night in any biome.

**Zombie chicken**

Is much faster than its normal counterpart, it hunts villagers and animals to subdue its thirst for blood.


**Zombie pig**

Is just as fast as a normal pig and will also hunt villagers and animals.



**Zombie cow**

Is slightly faster than a normal cow but does more damage and like the others will hunt villagers and animals.
